summary: Senior full-stack engineer with 8 years experience building distributed systems and leading engineering teams. Designed a real-time analytics platform that cut infrastructure costs by 35%. Proficient in React, TypeScript, Node.js, Go, and AWS.

bullets: Architected payment pipeline migration to event-driven microservices on AWS EKS, cutting p99 latency by 42% while maintaining 99.99% uptime
Designed fraud detection system that flags $12M+ in annual fraudulent charges across 50M+ daily transactions
Mentored 6 engineers through structured growth plans, yielding 3 internal promotions within 18 months
Optimized PostgreSQL query performance across 200 shards, reducing read latency from 850ms to 45ms
Built distributed tracing UI handling 10B+ daily spans with React and D3.js, cutting incident resolution time by 35%
Engineered custom query engine in Go and Elasticsearch for sub-second search across 5PB of log data
Led initiative redesigning metrics dashboards, improving load speed by 65% and lifting daily users by 22%
Developed Azure DevOps analytics pipeline serving 15,000 teams with 99.97% uptime across 200M monthly build records
Created automated regression framework that cut release cycles from 14 days to 3 days catching 94% of defects
Drove adoption of typed languages across 3 product teams, reducing production incidents by 40%

skills: Backend: Go, Python, Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch, Kafka, Flink
Tools: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, Git, Linux

projects.name: KafkaFlow
projects.description: Open-source tool for monitoring Kafka consumer lag, processing 100K messages per second with sub-second detection

publications.title: Low-Latency Event Sourcing for Distributed Payment Systems
